authorization_schemes.description: An array of JSON objects that specify the authorization scheme properties supported by the transmitter

spec_urn.description: The URN that describes the specification of the protocol being used

configuration_endpoint.description: The URL of the SSF stream configuration endpoint

default_subjects.description: A string that indicates the default behavior of newly created streams

delivery_methods_supported.description: An array of supported SET delivery methods

issuer.description: The issuer used in security event tokens. This value is set as `iss` in the claim.

jwks_uri.description: The URL of the JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) that contains the signing keys for validating the signatures of security event tokens (SETs)

spec_version.description: The version identifying the implementer's draft or final specification implemented by the transmitter

verification_endpoint.description: The URL of the SSF stream verification endpoint
